disposition_summary: Strategy 三軸 (lifecycle×review×deployment) canonical whitelist; live/paper/degraded 必須 reviewStatus=approved; legacy state 僅 adapter
Persona retired 為終態; 不允許 reactivate; 用 fork_persona_from_retired 帶 lineage
CapitalPool frozen 為 state (draft/active/frozen/rebalancing/restricted/retired); 另存 FreezeRecord
Incident↔Deployment rollback 採 Saga + idempotencyKey=rollback:{incidentId}:{deploymentId}:{targetVersion}
所有 async transition 必須使用 AsyncTransitionDescriptor (timeoutMs/failureState/failureReasonCode); 12 條 v0 default
EvolutionRun pause: pauseConsumesComputeQuota=false / pauseConsumesSla=true
Triple-Axis invariant validateOn 9 trigger; 違反 reject 不 auto-correct; legacy adapter 加 migrationWarning
Job cancelled 終態; retry 建立新 jobId 帶 retryOf/parentJobId; maxAttempts=3
quarantined memory 預設排除於 RAG; admin/risk_officer/research_lead 可 override 並 audit
Strategy 17 個 canonical action catalog; 每個帶 capability/allowedRoles/requiresApproval/riskLevel
Persona 17 個 canonical action catalog
Channel/Watchlist/Notebook 三 entity 加入 RBAC action catalog
capabilities 為 source of truth; roles 僅 default bundle hint; ROLE_CAPABILITIES 8 role bundle
DisabledReasonCode 15-enum (INSUFFICIENT_CAPABILITY/INVALID_STATE/...); i18n key actions.disabled.<code>
requiresEnv 不符提示文案 + i18n key actions.disabled.WRONG_ENVIRONMENT
cooldown 倒數 ground truth = serverTime; client local clock 不得作判定依據
capability namespace = lowercase dot.case + 大小寫敏感
Cursor TTL=15min; 失效回 CURSOR_EXPIRED/CURSOR_INVALID; UI fallback 重抓首頁保留 filter
Filter operator 採 bracket grammar filter[field][op]=value; 12 ops (eq/in/gte/contains/...)
sort=field
status: -updatedAt comma multi; null default last; override sort=field:asc:nullsFirst

disposition_summary: ErrorDetails 7 種 discriminated union (validation/state_conflict/permission/cursor/rate_limit/transition/idempotency)
ErrorCode master 23 項 enum; i18n errors.<ErrorCode>
ListResponse envelope: items+cursor+pageSize+estimatedTotal+totalCountExact; registry/governance true / feed false
BulkActionResponse partial success envelope; HTTP 207 Multi-Status preferred
Attachment policy: image 10MB / document 25MB / artifact metadata 100MB / model pre-signed; scanRequired
X-RateLimit-Limit/Remaining/Reset/Scope + Retry-After; remaining<10% warn / 429 countdown
SseEventEnvelope schemaVersion=1 + channel/type/correlationId/payload; 必須 discriminated union; 不得 payload:unknown
Last-Event-Id replayWindowSec=86400 / replayMaxEvents=10000; 過期 emit resync_required
heartbeatSec=15 / staleAfterSec=30 / timeoutSec=45 / reconnect backoff [1
resync_required 每 channel 對應 resync endpoint table
Handoff reopen slaResetOnReopen=false; 加 SlaSegment; 重置 SLA 需 approval+audit
CapitalPool breach formula: utilizationPct/riskBudgetUsagePct/concentrationPct + breach 門檻; window current/30d/24h
Metric registry canonical id 14 項 + MetricDef (unit/higherIsBetter/precision)
Quorum maxExtensions=1 / extensionHours=24; 第二次未達 escalate 至 committee/risk_officer/admin
Missing metric: required→fail_run; optional→penalty(-0.1); 可選 impute
Two-Man 必須 distinct userId; live deploy/capital apply/emergency 需 risk_officer + non-risk role
confirm token vs cooldown: cooldown 優先; cooldown active 不 issue token; redeem 失敗回 COOLDOWN_ACTIVE
audit reason min 40 (high-risk) / max 2000; server reject 不 silent truncate; UI 240 chars 折疊
Skill rollback / deprecate 互斥; incident block 時 rollback 優先
Spacing 4pt scale (0/4/8/12/16/20/24/32/40/48/64); type scale xs-3xl + mono-xs
Risk severity 5 階 HSL token (info/low/medium/high/critical); dark mode +8-12% lightness
Toast: top-right desktop / bottom-center mobile; duration 4-8s; critical sticky; max stack 5; dedupeKey
Form validation: onBlur + touched onChange + onSubmit full; high-risk memo 顯示剩餘字數
Skeleton threshold 200ms; min 300ms; >2s 顯示 Still loading; >10s 顯示 retry
Empty state 4 元素: icon+title+description+CTA(or reason); read-only disabled+tooltip
Confirm dialog + token flow 8 步 (impact→memo→token→exact phrase→idempotencyKey→execute→audit→realtime)
prefers-reduced-motion: 移除 spinner/gradient/marquee/pulse; 保留 ≤100ms opacity / focus ring
focus.ring color hsl(210
Format tokens: Intl.DateTimeFormat / Intl.NumberFormat (dateShort/dateTime/relativeTime/numberCompact/percent/currency)
Glossary key dot.case namespace (nav.controlRoom / v5.loop.execution.title / actions.<entity>.<action>.label)
Bucket color 5 階 chart token (bucket.1-5) 與 risk severity 對齊
/bff/me MeResponse DTO: user/tenant/roles/capabilities/env/featureFlags/serverTime/sessionExpiresAt/permissionsVersion; cache 30s
401 single silent refresh + retry once; concurrent 401 share refresh promise; 不得 infinite
Tenant scope priority: route param > session > token default > deny if ambiguous; X-Tenant-Id header
Logout invalidate: query/bff/v5ActionOverlay/SSE/permission/confirmToken/session; 保留 theme/locale
Locale priority: user pref > tenant default > browser > zh-TW
Locale fallback chain: resolved→language family→tenant.locale→zh-TW→en-US; zh-Hant→zh-TW
UI TZ priority: user.tz > tenant.tz > browser tz > UTC; audit timestamps store UTC ISO
Numeric/currency format 綁 resolvedLocale; currency code from entity/tenant baseCurrency
/bff/me 必填 tenant.id/env/featureFlags/capabilities/roles/serverTime/sessionExpiresAt; 併入 D51
Audit event correlationId chain: user click 建 correlationId; child 帶 causationId; loop/finding/intervention 必曝光
E2E scenario 命名 e2e.<surface>.<flow>.<expected>; fixture id prefix 11 種 (stg_/per_/cp_/...)
axe-core CI: critical/serious 違規 fail; moderate warn 除非 allowlist (需 owner+expiry)
Perf budget 5 page class: Control Room/Entity List/Detail/Heavy Studio/Sentinel-HIQ (LCP 2.0-3.5s / TTI 2.5-4.5s)
